title: CCL - Put the app in the background
scenario: Verify that the previously selected CCL setting persists after the app is backgrounded and then brought back to the foreground.
steps: Put the app in the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
Bring the app back to the foreground (e.g., tap the app icon or switch back to it).
expected: The previously selected CCL setting is still displayed.
